zh.Walton, York, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭越可爾沃爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton於大約1290年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親John Fairfax Esq.30歲，母親Clarissa Scott19歲。他於1319年與Elizabeth de Etton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Walton, York, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰越可爾沃爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton于大约1290年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲John Fairfax Esq.30岁，母亲Clarissa Scott19岁。他于1319年与Elizabeth de Etton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton was born about 1290, in Yorkshire, England, his father, John Fairfax Esq., was 30 and his mother, Clarissa Scott, was 19. He married Elizabeth de Etton in 1319. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died after 1349, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton est né environ 1290, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Fairfax Esq., avait 30 ans et sa mère, Clarissa Scott, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth d’Etton en 1319. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé après 1349, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton um 1290 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fairfax Esq. 30 und seine Mutter Clarissa Scott 19. Er hat 1319 Elizabeth de Etton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb nach 1349 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton è nato il circa 1290 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Fairfax Esq., aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Clarissa Scott, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Etton nel 1319. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 1349, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Waltonが約1290年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Fairfax Esq.は30歳，母Clarissa Scottは19歳であった。1319年にElizabeth de Ettonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fairfax Esq.(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Clarissa Scott(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1319년 Elizabeth de Etton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fairfax Esq., tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Clarissa Scott, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Etton em 1319. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1349, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton родился около 1290 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fairfax Esq. было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Clarissa Scott, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Etton в 1319 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер после 1349 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton nació aproximadamente 1290, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fairfax Esq., tenía 30 años y su mamá, Clarissa Scott, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Etton en 1319. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió después de 1349, en su pueblo.
